.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(37, 37, 37, 0.765) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
blockquote::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#9096A4, color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#9096A4, color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: color(srgb 0.395294 0.411765 0.450196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: color(srgb 0.395294 0.411765 0.450196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgba(165, 170, 182, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
